hero.title: Sweden's most
hero.subtitle: We build tomorrow's digital solutions with Swedish precision and global reach
hero.description: We help you navigate digital transformation with tailored system solutions.

hero.title: Flexible packages for all needs
hero.subtitle: Choose the package that fits your business. All prices are excluding VAT.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Contact us for a free consultation where we discuss your needs.

webbstart.title: Web Starter
webbstart.description: Perfect for businesses that want to get online quickly and cost-effectively.
webbstart.details: Perfect for startups and small businesses looking to establish a professional online presence. We build a mobile-optimised website with up to 5 pages, a contact form and basic SEO so you appear on Google. SSL certificate included for secure connections. You get 1 hour of technical support per month and delivery typically within 2–3 weeks.

business.title: Business Premium
business.description: Custom management page for your unique business needs.
business.details: A tailored platform for mid-sized businesses with specific operational needs. We integrate your existing processes into a unified system with CRM customisation, unlimited pages, advanced search and a booking system with calendar. Includes email integration, Google Analytics and monthly performance reports. Priority support with 24-hour response time.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce
ecommerce.description: Complete e-commerce solution to sell your products online.
ecommerce.details: A complete e-commerce platform to sell products and services online. We integrate Klarna and Stripe for smooth payments, real-time inventory management, order history and customer accounts. Includes discount codes, campaign management, automatic invoicing with VAT calculations and SEO-optimised product pages. 24/7 technical support included.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Custom enterprise solution for large businesses with complex needs.
enterprise.details: A fully bespoke enterprise solution for large organisations with complex requirements. We build to your exact specifications with API integrations into existing systems, Single Sign-On for seamless authentication and advanced role-based permission management. Includes a dedicated server environment, SLA with 99.9% guaranteed uptime, a personal project manager and unlimited consulting time.

1.title: Business Premium
1.description: Tailored solution for your business needs.

2.title: E-commerce
2.description: Complete e-commerce solution to sell online.

ssl.title: SSL certificate
ssl.description: Secure connections and better SEO ranking

upgrade.question: Can I change packages later?
upgrade.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your package at any time. The price is adjusted proportionally.

domain.question: Is domain name included?
domain.answer: Domain names are not included in the packages, but we are happy to help you register a domain at cost price.

commitment.question: Is there a commitment period?
commitment.answer: No, all our packages are month-to-month with no commitment. You can cancel at any time.

support.question: What does support cost?
support.answer: Support is included in all packages as specified. Extended support can be purchased.

reasons.title: Agile delivery

reasons.title: Security focus
reasons.description: DevSecOps from day one – we build security into every layer of the system.

reasons.title: Global reach
reasons.description: Our solutions are built to scale globally, with local adaptation.

process.title: How we work

steps.title: Understand

steps.title: Design
steps.description: We create a scalable architecture and technical roadmap that meets both today's and tomorrow's requirements.

steps.title: Develop
steps.description: Agile development with clean code, automated testing and continuous integration.

steps.title: Refine
steps.description: We deliver, monitor and optimize – in close collaboration with you.
